title: poa reclinata
intro: Poa reclinata, also known as the climbing poa, is a type of grass species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and antioxidant properties. Poa reclinata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional remedies in various African cultures.
